title: Climate Home News
description: Climate change news, analysis, commentary, video and podcasts focused on developments in global climate politics

items.title: Mombasa ocean summit drives progress on marine protection, but threats persist
items.description:
At the 11th Our Ocean conference in Kenya, its founder John Kerry says the ocean must become central to climate solutions and needs to be looked after

items.title: Bonn climate talks end in “gridlock” on adaptation and emissions-cutting
items.description:

items.title: Warning against ‘consumer club’ as G7 forms critical minerals alliance
items.description:

items.title: The UN climate process was built for negotiation – now it must support implementation
items.description:
Consultations are underway on reforms to streamline the talks, which take too long to produce outcomes that are often not adequate to tackle the scale of the climate crisis

items.title: Bonn Bulletin: Finance row threatens to scupper work on adaptation goal
items.description:

items.title: West African nations target Eastern Atlantic for early high seas protection

items.title: Science ‘under attack’ from fossil fuel interests at UN climate talks

items.title: The vote that stopped a data center: US communities query resource-hungry AI
items.description:

items.title: Bonn Bulletin: Adaptation Fund stalemate puts people at risk, says head
items.description:

items.title: Coral reefs are not doomed – but policy must catch up with the science
items.description:

items.title: Bonn Bulletin: Finance dominates discussions in every room

items.title: European, island states seek clear future for global roadmap to cut fossil fuels

items.title: Fewer journalists register for Bonn talks, as cuts to climate reporting bite

items.title: WHO issues new guidance on heat-health action plans, as El Niño sets in

items.title: The Pacific made history in the courts – now we must do it in the negotiations

items.title: Brazil jostles for rare earths share as US-China rivalry heats up

items.title: The UN climate process needs ambition – the law demands it
items.description:
